overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a cowboy hat walking through a historic Southern city resembling late 19th century New Orleans. The character navigates cobblestone streets lined with Victorian mansions, passes through a narrow alleyway with lush vegetation and a smokehouse, and emerges onto commercial streets with a theater and industrial smokestacks visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic residential street with Victorian mansions and iron fences

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a cobblestone street between historic Victorian mansions, approaching a flowering tree

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress standing near the iron fence watching the street
horse-drawn carriage with red wheels moving along the cobblestone road

brown brick mansion with white columns and ornate railings

tall wooden telegraph pole with multiple crossbars and wires
tree with pink blossoms visible down the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a sunlit cobblestone residential street lined with grand Victorian mansions. A woman in a red dress stands near an iron fence on the left, while a horse-drawn carriage passes by. The street is framed by wooden utility poles and a flowering tree visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard alley with small smokehouse and tropical vegetation

events.description: turns right off the main street into a courtyard area with a small stone building emitting smoke

agents.ego_description: turns right into a narrow courtyard passage with lush greenery, approaching a small stone building with smoke rising from its chimney

entered.detail: small weathered stone building with wooden door and smoke rising from chimney
tall palm tree with green fronds overhanging the courtyard
large terracotta pots with green foliage arranged along the wall
red brick wall with weathered surface enclosing the courtyard
stacked wooden crates and barrels near the small building

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a sheltered courtyard alley with dense tropical vegetation. A small stone building emitting black smoke sits ahead, surrounded by potted plants and wooden crates. The green mansion from the previous street is still visible in the far distance through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow brick alleyway with high walls and stone archway

events.description: enters a narrow enclosed brick alleyway with a stone archway visible at the far end

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit narrow alleyway with high brick walls on both sides, heading toward a stone archway exit

entered.detail: tall weathered brick wall with moss and grime covering the surface
tall brick wall with metal ladder attached and small windows
arched stone tunnel passage leading to bright exit
old wooden wheelbarrow with metal wheel leaning against the wall
rusted metal barrel sitting against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed brick alleyway with high walls blocking the sky. The passage contains a wooden wheelbarrow and metal barrel, leading toward a stone archway that frames a bright exit ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with theater and industrial district backdrop

events.description: exits the narrow alley onto a commercial street with a large theater building
horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left in front of the theater

agents.ego_description: emerges onto a commercial street and walks past a theater building, heading toward an industrial area with visible smokestacks

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with driver passing by the theater entrance
group of pedestrians in period clothing walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: ornate three-story building with vertical 'THEATRE' sign and green and white painted facade
tall factory smokestacks emitting black smoke visible in the distance
metal water tower on wooden supports rising above the buildings
two-story commercial building with green and white painted lower facade

segments.scene_description: The character exits the alley onto a sunlit commercial street dominated by a large theater building with a vertical sign. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left while pedestrians in period clothing walk along the sidewalks. In the distance, industrial smokestacks emit black smoke against the sky, and a water tower rises above the rooftops.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright residential neighborhood through a series of narrowing passages and into a bustling commercial district. It begins on a sunlit cobblestone street lined with grand Victorian mansions, passing a woman in a red dress and a horse-drawn carriage. As the character turns right, the open street shifts into a sheltered courtyard alley filled with dense tropical vegetation and a small stone building emitting black smoke. The scene then tightens further into a narrow, enclosed brick alleyway with high walls and scattered debris before the camera moves toward a bright stone archway. Finally, the view opens up onto a wide commercial street featuring a large theater and pedestrians in period clothing, with industrial smokestacks and a water tower rising in the distance.
